data.description:
## Why
The "select a prompt / author in place" half of the vision: compose by selecting from a typed
library, and author new prompts in the UI.

## What
- Library dropdown listing built-in + project prompts (from the derived index + project dir),
  surfaced via editor endpoints (`src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py`, `editor_assets/`). Selecting
  one sets a step's `prompt:`.
- CREATE a new prompt and EDIT prompt text in the UI. On Save, write-back AUTO-DETECTS a writable
  `nava-rebar` source checkout (-> edit the packaged `.md`) else writes a `.rebar/prompts/<id>.md`
  project override; SHOW the resolved target path before Save; REFUSE packaged writes when read-only.
  Writes go through S2's canonical writer.
- Round-trip golden tests prove no corruption on authored/edited prompts.

## Scope
In: library + create/edit + write-back location logic + tests. Out: properties-panel structured
fields (S8).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The dropdown lists built-in + project prompts; selecting sets `prompt:`; create-new + edit-text persist via the S2 writer.
- [ ] Write-back target is auto-detected and the resolved path is shown; a packaged write is refused when read-only; round-trip tests pass (no corruption).
- [ ] A browser e2e exercises select / create / edit / Save.
data.title: Editor prompt library + authoring/write-back (select + create + edit in place)
